task_completion.description: Navigate to the Chrysler Building or target coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Map view centered on the Chrysler Building (distinctive Art Deco spire) or search bar showing 'Chrysler Building' or coordinates '40.7516, -73.9755'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct placemark name in the dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Placemark' or 'Edit Placemark' dialog is open with 'NYC Regional Office' typed in the Name field.
The Description field/tab in the placemark dialog contains the text: 'Regional headquarters - Eastern Division. Established 2019.'

task_completion.description: Select a building-related icon and set color to blue
task_completion.visual_evidence: The icon button in the placemark dialog (top right) shows a blue building/skyscraper icon, OR the 'Style, Color' tab shows the Icon color set to blue (blue swatch) and a building icon is selected.

task_completion.description: Set the view altitude/range between 500-2000 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'View' tab in the placemark dialog shows a 'Range' value between 500 and 2000, OR the bottom-right status bar shows 'Eye alt' between 500m and 2000m (or equivalent in ft) while the placemark is being set.

task_completion.description: Verify placemark is saved to My Places with correct attributes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'My Places' sidebar lists 'NYC Regional Office', and the map displays the blue building icon located specifically at the Chrysler Building.

integrity.description: Verify agent uses the Google Earth GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Google Earth menus, toolbars, and dialog boxes, not command-line scripts.

integrity.description: Verify agent does not manually write KML files
integrity.visual_evidence: Agent does not use a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) to write XML/KML code manually.
Agent types or inputs the description into the application fields rather than pasting a pre-completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Chrysler Building is located at 40.7516, -73.9755. The required placemark name is 'NYC Regional Office'. The description must be 'Regional headquarters - Eastern Division. Established 2019.'. The view altitude (Range or Eye alt) must be between 500m and 2000m. The icon must be blue and depict a building.
